者设了很多伏笔，慢慢的，在过程中展开解惑，所以阅读的过程中，有一种让人欲罢不能，尽快想把它看完的感觉，所以总会出现感觉意犹未尽，更新的太慢，当然，主角的各种能力加持源于他自己的天赋异禀，以及他来自上界的父母给他的这种与众不同的力量吧，当然，每个人的成功也不是随随便便的，他也是后面有高人指点，也是有一帮能够出生入死的兄弟撑着他，总会有贵人能够相助，当然，其中的恩怨情仇，有相助的就有拆台的，所以让故事情节显得有血有肉，合情合理，整个生活的气息比较浓厚，当然，也有高屋建瓴的一些值得去深思的哲学问题，义字当头吧，嗯，走的多远飞的多高？都不会忘本，都不会忘了最初的那些兄弟姐妹，可能这个是作者需要体现的，书中的价值观吧。","text_exts":[{"e":322,"s":318,"text":"义字当头","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E5%BD%93%E5%A4%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773993643368CE691%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227246403349834203941%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227064405896540982309%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E5%BD%93%E5%A4%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687184859,"group_id":"7064405896540982309","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"CV，A+，金牌讲师。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzyi/3mWGOVA7Fx4oHb75XHneS4Ydo/P9bUN0VTzsgM/","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e05b7a75871d4d5ab1443fd2b27eca61~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533841&x-signature=IozXAV4BkrSIOpNQXwjL5yoT8%2FA%3D","user_id":"4037012599617511","user_name":"蒙特+"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4037012599617511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1797373632,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":
